@dzupagent/dialogue-core.architectureRole: Layer-0 leaf runtime primitive: provider-neutral dialogue orchestration contracts with no @dzupagent runtime dependencies.

@dzupagent/dialogue-core-replay.architectureRole: Layer-1 replay harness for dialogue-core ports. Depends only on the dialogue-core contract package and stays outside host/runtime composition.

@dzupagent/cache.architectureRole: Layer-0 leaf runtime primitive: dependency-light cache contracts, middleware, and backend implementations with no @dzupagent runtime dependencies.

@dzupagent/adapter-types.architectureRole: Layer-0 leaf runtime primitive: adapter type contracts with no @dzupagent runtime dependencies. Promoted from tier-2 to tier-1 to align tier ordering with actual dependency direction.

@dzupagent/adapter-rules.architectureRole: Layer-1 foundation package: adapter rule contracts that depend only on adapter-types (tier 1). Promoted from tier-2 to tier-1 to align tier ordering with actual dependency direction.

@dzupagent/connectors-documents.architectureRole: Layer-0 leaf runtime primitive: document parse/chunk/type contracts with no direct dependency on @dzupagent server composition. Promoted from tier-2 to tier-1 to govern root-barrel public API via explicit allowlist rules.

@dzupagent/flow-ast.architectureRole: Layer-0 leaf runtime primitive: canonical flow AST contracts plus local parser and validator helpers with no @dzupagent runtime dependencies. Promoted from tier-2 to tier-1 to align tier ordering with actual dependency direction.

@dzupagent/memory-ipc.architectureRole: Layer-0 leaf runtime primitive: Arrow frame contracts, IPC serialization, and memory exchange operations with no @dzupagent runtime dependencies. Promoted from tier-2 to tier-1 to align tier ordering with actual dependency direction.

@dzupagent/app-tools.architectureRole: Layer-4 composition package. Promoted from tier-3 to tier-2 because @dzupagent/server (tier 2) has a declared runtime dependency on this package. The package remains lower-priority but cannot be tier-3 while a tier-2 package depends on it.

@dzupagent/code-edit-kit.architectureRole: Layer-3 orchestration composition package. Promoted from tier-3 to tier-2 because @dzupagent/app-tools (tier 2) has a declared runtime dependency on this package. The package remains lower-priority but cannot be tier-3 while a tier-2 package depends on it.

@dzupagent/hitl-kit.architectureRole: Layer-0 leaf runtime primitive: HITL (human-in-the-loop) type contracts with no @dzupagent runtime dependencies. Promoted from tier-3 to tier-1 to align tier ordering with actual dependency direction; @dzupagent/server depends on this package.

@dzupagent/subagents.architectureRole: Layer-2 domain capability: governed async background subagent runtime. Depends only on layer-0 contracts (adapter-types, hitl-kit) and layer-1 foundation (core). Concrete checkpointer and agent execution are injected via ports, wired by @dzupagent/agent-adapters, to preserve the DAG.
